title: Rebuild Admin Inbox Page with Proper Contact Form Submissions Display

requirements.text: Update the hardcoded admin password in the useAdminAuth hook to 'debrajhero'. The password check must be case-sensitive and exactly match 'debrajhero'.

quotes: set the password of admin box as debrajhero

acceptanceCriteria: Entering 'debrajhero' grants access to the admin inbox
Entering any other string (including 'Debrajhero' or 'DEBRAJHERO') is rejected
Authenticated state is persisted in sessionStorage so page refresh does not log the admin out

requirements.text: Rebuild the AdminPage component (frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx) so it is accessible at the /admin route and is fully protected by the AdminPasswordGate. When the correct password is entered, it must render the AdminInbox component which fetches and displays all contact form submissions from the backend.

quotes: rebuilding app with a proper working admin page that shows all contact form submissions

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin shows a password prompt before any inbox content is visible
After entering 'debrajhero', the admin inbox is rendered
The inbox displays all submitted contact form entries (name, phone, business type, message, timestamp)
A logout button in the header clears the session and returns to the password prompt
Loading, error, and empty states are handled gracefully with clear UI feedback

requirements.text: Rebuild the AdminInbox component (frontend/src/components/AdminInbox.tsx) to reliably call the getAllInquiries backend endpoint and render every submission in a structured, readable list or table. Remove any Internet Identity auth check that blocks the admin inbox from loading — access is already gated by the password in AdminPasswordGate.

quotes: a proper working admin page that shows all contact form submissions

acceptanceCriteria: getAllInquiries is called on mount and results are displayed without requiring Internet Identity login
Each submission card/row shows: submitter name, phone number, business type, message, and submission date/time
A refresh button allows the admin to reload submissions without navigating away
Empty state shows a clear message when no submissions exist
Error state shows a descriptive error message if the backend call fails

requirements.text: Ensure the backend getAllInquiries function in backend/main.mo returns all stored contact form inquiries without any Internet Identity or principal-based access restriction, since admin access is fully gated on the frontend by the password.

quotes: a proper working admin page that shows all contact form submissions

acceptanceCriteria: getAllInquiries returns the full list of all submitted inquiries
The function is callable by any identity (anonymous or authenticated) since the password gate is on the frontend
Existing stored inquiries are preserved across the upgrade

requirements.text: Ensure the React Router (or equivalent routing) in App.tsx includes a dedicated /admin route that renders the AdminPage component, so users can navigate directly to the admin inbox by visiting /admin in the browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting <app-url>/admin in the browser loads the AdminPage with the password gate
The /admin route does not appear in the main public navigation
All other existing page sections (Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Contact, Footer) continue to render correctly on the root / route

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing contact form submission data stored in the backend canister
nonGoals: Adding Internet Identity login as a requirement to view the admin inbox
Building a multi-user admin system or role-based access control
Changing the public-facing portfolio page design or any public sections
Adding email notifications for new form submissions
